description: The Rodà are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta from Condofuri, Calabria, operating along the Ionian coast. They have branches in Liguria, specifically in Lavagna, allied with the Nucera and Casile families. The group has been involved in public works corruption, including influencing contracts for the Strada statale 106 Jonica. Recent operations have targeted their activities in Liguria.
